reasoning: The control CCCS MA-4: Nonlocal Maintenance pertains to ensuring secure practices for remote maintenance activities. This is more aligned with operational procedures and access management practices that are typically handled at the cloud provider level or through organizational policies. Kubernetes itself does not directly manage nonlocal maintenance activities, as it focuses on orchestrating containerized applications. The control is more about how remote access and maintenance are handled securely, which is outside the scope of Kubernetes-specific security features.
title: CCCS MA-4: Nonlocal Maintenance
